name: BLAF architecten, Stijn Bollaert · gjG House · Divisare
snippet: The gjG house is one of the early houses in that series, in which the architects explore the re-use of bricks and the shape of the shell in function of its autonomy.

name: gjG House by BLAF Architects - Architizer
snippet: The gjG house seems to be set in a forest-like residential environment, while actually it sits right next to the E17-highway in Ghent, on a plot that used to be part of the garden of a late 19th century mansion.

name: The Curved gjG House By BLAF Architects Use Recycled Bricks
snippet: Exploring the reuse of bricks, the gjG House is one of the experimental houses by BLAF architecten in Belgium. The project is a part of their research, ‘Brick Wall City’, addressing the precise relationship between material, construction and the appearance of brick architecture.
